reason: Task is still valid. While the workflow-backed ao planning facade exists, the legacy hardcoded direct-execution paths in ops_planning/ have not been removed and ao vision/requirements commands still route through them. The core goal of collapsing to one supported operator journey and deleting dead paths remains unfinished.

evidence.description: ops_planning/draft_runtime.rs, refinement_runtime.rs, requirements_runtime.rs still exist as parallel legacy execution paths
ao planning facade in ops_planning_facade.rs correctly routes to builtin workflows, confirming the new path is ready
ao vision draft/refine and ao requirements draft/refine still route through legacy direct-execution paths, not through the workflow engine
